TAGB Affiliated · Ages 5+ & Adults

🥋 Family Taekwondo

Train together as a family on the official TAGB syllabus — from complete beginner to Black Belt and beyond.

📍 York — Tuesday
📍 Beverley — Wednesday
📍 Stamford Bridge — Friday
📍 Market Weighton — Saturday
What is Family Taekwondo?

Train Together. Grow Together.

Our Family Taekwondo classes follow the official TAGB (Tae Kwon Do Association of Great Britain) syllabus — Europe's largest single martial arts organisation. Children from age 5 and adults of all ages are welcome, and parents are actively encouraged to train alongside their children.

Classes are split into Beginner/Intermediate and Intermediate/Advanced levels, so whether you're stepping on the mat for the first time or working towards your next Dan grade, there's a class for you.

The training is non-violent, focusing on physical and emotional control, fitness, flexibility and practical self-defence. Competition and grading are always optional — the main focus is that you enjoy yourself and improve at your own pace.

  • 🏅 TAGB Official Syllabus — Europe's Largest Martial Arts Organisation
  • 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Parents & Children Train Together
  • 🎁 3rd Family Member Trains FREE on All Packages
  • 🏆 100+ Black Belts Produced Since 2011
  • 🎯 Optional Grading & Competition — No Pressure

The Five Tenants of Taekwondo

These are the behavioural goals that guide everything we teach — helping young people and adults be and do their best, both on and off the mat.

🤝

Courtesy

Respect for others, politeness and consideration in all we do.

⚖️

Integrity

Honesty, strong moral principles and doing the right thing.

💪

Perseverance

Never giving up, working through difficulty to achieve your goals.

🧘

Self-Control

Managing emotions and actions — on the mat and in everyday life.

🔥

Indomitable Spirit

An unconquerable will — the courage to face any challenge.

Your Path to Black Belt

There are ten coloured belts to achieve before grading for Black Belt. The minimum training time to reach Black Belt at Train Taekwondo Schools is 5 years — but every step of the journey is rewarding in itself.

White
→
Yellow
→
Yellow Tag
→
Green
→
Green Tag
→
Blue
→
Blue Tag
→
Red
→
Red Tag
→
Black Belt
Start Your Journey Today →

Benefits of Taekwondo

🏃

Fitness & Health

Improve cardiovascular fitness, strength, flexibility and coordination. Keeping active has never been this much fun.

💪

Real Confidence

Confidence built through achievement — every belt earned, every technique mastered builds genuine self-belief.

🛡️

Practical Self-Defence

Learn real self-defence skills — blocks, kicks, punches and restraints — that you can use if you ever need to.

🎯

Focus & Discipline

Skills that carry directly into the classroom and workplace. Better concentration, better results.

👨‍👩‍👧

Family Bonding

Train side by side with your children. Share the journey, celebrate the achievements together.

🏆

Optional Competition

The TAGB holds tournaments throughout the year. Compete if you want to — but there's never any pressure.

See Our Family Classes in Action

Watch our promo video and see what a Family Taekwondo class really looks like — parents and children training together.

🎁 First Session is Always FREE

No kit needed. No commitment. Come along and see if Taekwondo is right for your family.
